# @ic-reactor/cli — AI Quick Guide

CLI for explicit, repeatable IC Reactor code generation from `.did` files.

## Install and Run

```bash
pnpm add -D @ic-reactor/cli
pnpm exec ic-reactor init
pnpm exec ic-reactor generate
```

## Configuration

- Primary config file: `ic-reactor.json`
- JSON Schema: `./node_modules/@ic-reactor/cli/schema.json`
- Key fields: `outDir`, `clientManagerPath`, `target`, `canisters`

## Target Modes

- `react`: reactor + typed hook exports
- `core`: typed reactor exports only (no React dependency)

## Generated Files

- Managed: `index.generated.ts` (overwritten every generation)
- Stable wrapper: `index.ts` (safe to customize)

Do not hand-edit `index.generated.ts`.

## CLI vs Vite Plugin

- Use CLI for CI/non-Vite/manual generation pipelines
- Use `@ic-reactor/vite-plugin` for watch-mode generation in Vite apps

## Full References

- Full AI guide: https://ic-reactor.b3pay.net/llms-full.txt
- CLI docs: https://ic-reactor.b3pay.net/v4/packages/cli
